title: Deepfakes and Synthetic Media

modules.title: Understanding Deepfake Technology
modules.sub: Exploring how AI generates convincing synthetic media content
modules.description: Learners examine the core AI techniques behind deepfake generation, including GANs and diffusion models. They trace the evolution of synthetic media from early face-swap tools to today's hyper-realistic outputs. By the end, learners can explain how these systems work to non-technical stakeholders.

modules.title: Detecting Synthetic Content
modules.sub: Building practical skills to identify and flag manipulated media
modules.description: Learners apply detection frameworks and tools to analyze suspect images, videos, and audio clips. They practice spotting telltale artifacts—unnatural blinking, audio mismatches, and pixel inconsistencies—using both manual inspection and AI-assisted tools. Learners leave with a repeatable verification workflow they can deploy in their professional context.

modules.title: Social Impact and Risks
modules.sub: Assessing how synthetic media threatens trust and public discourse
modules.description: Learners investigate real-world cases where deepfakes have influenced elections, enabled fraud, and damaged reputations. They evaluate the downstream risks to journalism, legal evidence, and organizational credibility. Through scenario analysis, learners develop a risk-ranking framework tailored to their industry.

modules.title: Ethical Creation Guidelines
modules.sub: Defining responsible boundaries for legitimate synthetic media use
modules.description: Learners review emerging regulatory standards and voluntary industry codes governing synthetic media production. They work through case studies to distinguish legitimate creative and commercial uses from harmful applications. Learners draft a practical ethical-use policy or decision checklist applicable to their own organization.

synopsis: Learn how AI creates realistic fake videos, audio, and images. Develop skills to identify synthetic media and understand its implications for society.
